title: Agentic Pharmacy OS
desc: Full pharmacy management platform on Cloudflare Workers: dashboard, inventory, sales, and cashflow tracking, paired with an agentic AI assistant on Telegram that runs day to day operations by chat: checking stock levels, flagging low/expiring items, and adding new products through natural conversation.
problem: Pharmacies tracked stock, sales, and cashflow by hand, with no fast way to query or update the business.
outcome: AI agent manages stock via chat

title: Cantina Food Point
desc: AI powered food ordering platform for restaurants on Cloudflare. Customers order via WhatsApp in Swahili or English through Marco, an agentic AI waiter that takes orders end to end with no app or account required, plus live shareable order tracking. A Cloudflare Workers + D1 back office gives staff a real time kitchen queue, order overview, menu management, and full conversation logs.
problem: Restaurants ran ordering and kitchen queues by phone call and memory, with no way for customers to order or track status without calling in.
outcome: AI waiter takes orders via WhatsApp

title: Mnyama Check
desc: Flutter app for livestock health tracking: subscriptions, notifications, and a refreshed UI for field use.

title: Mnyama Collector
desc: Companion app for field teams to collect and log animal disease data, structured for AI model training.

title: Agrovet POS
desc: In app inventory + point of sale system handling stock, sales, and payment flows for agrovet outlets.

title: SmartINNO Platform
desc: Six backend microservices, an internal video conferencing service, and a React metrics dashboard for leadership.

title: Security Scan Platform
desc: Web app integrating OWASP based scanning tools so clients can scan targets and surface vulnerabilities.

title: 3D Catalog (Three.js)
desc: Scan a QR code to load an interactive 3D view of an item, a web experience for a virtual catalog.

title: namps-ui Design System
desc: An Anthropic inspired React component library: 33 accessible components, light/dark theming via CSS tokens, and a full documentation site with live examples.
problem: No reusable, on brand UI kit.

title: namps-native
desc: A calm, token driven React Native UI library: Button, Input, Switch and more, documented with live, interactive examples rendered via react-native-web.
problem: No reusable, on brand mobile UI kit.
